case_title: THOMAS IVELI VS. KEVIN CHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KEVIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF THOMAS IVELI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICES ARE DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $588.19 FILED BY IVELI, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KEVIN JUNG, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
